title: Scanner inventory collected completely
recommendation: No action needed — every eligible workspace was scanned.

title: Medallion / layer naming convention
recommendation: Layer-based workspace naming is in place. Continue to mirror the convention on lakehouses (lh_bronze / lh_silver / lh_gold) and on Deployment Pipeline stages.

title: Workspaces without Fabric capacity assignment
recommendation: Assign every production workspace to a Fabric capacity. Pro-only / unassigned workspaces cannot host Fabric items.

title: Workspaces exceeding monolithic threshold (>50 items)
recommendation: Split large workspaces by domain/layer. Large workspaces complicate RBAC, deployment pipelines, and lineage analysis.

title: Workspaces missing a description
recommendation: Add a short description to every workspace describing purpose, owner, and environment.

title: Empty workspaces (no items)
recommendation: Archive or repurpose empty workspaces to keep the tenant inventory clean.

title: Personal (My workspace) workspaces in use
recommendation: Migrate any production content out of personal workspaces into shared, capacity-backed workspaces.

title: OneLake shortcut metadata detected (1 shortcut signal(s))
recommendation: Keep using shortcuts for cross-workspace/layer sharing and document ownership of the source tables.

title: 1 deployment pipeline(s) configured; production workspaces covered
recommendation: Maintain stage assignments as new workspaces are introduced.

title: Deployment pipelines present but no stage-artifact data was returned

evidence.reason: Stage artifact endpoints returned nothing (permissions or empty stages).

recommendation: Re-run the deployment_pipelines collector with an identity that has pipeline admin rights so stage promotion state can be evaluated.

title: No Real-Time Intelligence or Mirrored Database items detected
recommendation: If the architecture has streaming or zero-ETL requirements, evaluate Eventhouse / KQL Database (real-time analytics), Eventstream (ingest), Reflex / Activator (operational alerts) and Mirrored Databases (zero-ETL replication).

title: Semantic-model storage-mode distribution
recommendation: If many Import models read lakehouse Delta tables, evaluate Direct Lake. DirectQuery should be limited to scenarios that genuinely require it.

title: No ExecuteNotebook / TridentNotebook activities found in collected pipeline definitions
recommendation: Either no pipelines orchestrate notebooks yet, or the getDefinition calls failed (check pipeline_definitions.json 'errors'). Re-run the pipeline_definitions collector to confirm.

title: Workspaces connected to Git source control
recommendation: Connect production workspaces to Git for change tracking, peer review and deployment pipeline support.
